summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mi-LessonPlan rebranding (miLessonPlan → Mi-LessonPlan), MyFiles card overflow fixes, and dictation shared link audio download. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: manifest.json short_name is 'Mi-LessonPlan'
Backend: manifest.json name contains 'Mi-LessonPlan'
Backend: service-worker.js cache name contains 'mi-lessonplan'
Backend: API health check passes
Backend: Login page accessible with Mi-LessonPlan branding
Backend: Referral endpoint returns mi-lessonplan.site URLs
Backend: Dictation shared link download returns audio/mpeg content type
Backend: Downloaded dictation is valid MP3 audio (starts with ff f3 sync bytes)
Backend: All MyFiles API endpoints working (lessons, dictations, uploads, schemes, templates)
Frontend: Login page title is 'Mi-LessonPlan'
Frontend: Login page H1 shows 'Mi-LessonPlan'
Frontend: Login page logo has alt='Mi-LessonPlan'
Frontend: No old branding 'miLessonPlan' found on login page
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'Mi-LessonPlan Admin'
Frontend: Admin dashboard logo has alt='Mi-LessonPlan'
Frontend: Header navbar shows 'Mi-LessonPlan'
Frontend: SharedView page shows 'Mi-LessonPlan' in header
Frontend: SharedView footer shows 'Powered by Mi-LessonPlan'
Frontend: MyFiles cards - no button overflow in desktop view (1920x1080)
Frontend: MyFiles cards - no button overflow in mobile view (390x844)
Frontend: Dictation cards - Share/Play/Download buttons properly contained
Frontend: Upload cards - content_type has truncate class for long text
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebranding from 'miLessonPlan' to 'Mi-LessonPlan' fully verified across all pages (login, admin dashboard, header, shared view, footer). PWA assets (manifest.json, service-worker.js) updated with correct branding. MyFiles card overflow fixes verified - cards properly contain buttons in both desktop and mobile views. Dictation shared link download now returns real audio/mpeg MP3 files instead of text documents. TTS generation working correctly via Emergent API.

myfiles_overflow_fixes.dictation_cards: Buttons (Share, Play, Download) properly contained with flex-wrap

dictation_shared_link_download.file_format: Valid MP3 (starts with ff f3 sync bytes)
